name: Midnight Mallow Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt marshmallows and chocolate in a double boiler. Add boiling water, beating constantly until smooth. Remove from heat; cool.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Beat eggs until foamy. Gradually add sugar, beating constantly until thick and lemon-colored.
4. Add vanilla and the chocolate-marshmallow mixture to the egg mixture. Mix well.
5. Blend in sour cream. Add dry ingredients in four additions, mixing well after each addition.
6. Pour into 2 well-greased and floured 9-inch round pans.
7. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes.
8. Cool and frost with Fluffy Marshmallow Frosting.
Fluffy Marshmallow Frosting:
1. Combine egg whites, sugar, light corn syrup, water, cream of tartar, and salt in the top of a double boiler.
2. Cook over rapidly boiling water, beating constantly until the mixture forms stiff peaks.
3. Add marshmallows; beat until dissolved.
4. Remove from heat. Add vanilla, continue beating until thick enough to spread.
